pages.title: Friendship Bracelet
pages.text: Friendship Bracelet is the consistency path for pair progression. Keep it in your normal inventory; like Ring, it activates only when both partners have it together.
Luck scaling by trust tick is: 1-5 = +0, 6-7 = +1, 8 = +2, 9 = +3. It is not an early spike item; it grows with trust maturity.
Bracelet excels in medium and long sessions where stable outcomes matter more than short explosive peaks. It smooths progression and lowers dependence on single high-roll moments.
Teams that play structured routes, disciplined regroups, and clean objective pacing usually get the most value here. Bracelet rewards process quality more than improvisation.
$(italic)If your duo values reliability over spectacle, Bracelet scales extremely well.$() It becomes stronger the more consistent your shared behavior is.
